title: Gravity Book
description: Adds a book that when you hold it gravity is flipped, similar to when you drink the Gravity Potion in terraria.
body:
## **What does this datapack do?**
#### Adds a book that when you hold it gravity is flipped, similar to when you drink the Gravity Potion in terraria.


## **How do you craft it?**
### Costs 1 book and 8 diamonds:
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b05ba3b5b2e336f4bb049068a2e8080afe0c654.png)


## **Why did I make this?**
#### I made this so I can get super high up in my elytra without using a bunch on gunpowder.



## **Is it cool?**
#### Very cool and fun, would work great with the mace. Also, very fun to jump and float around with in caves when mining or exploring.
